name_en: 5BG276, Miu Miu new Isetan limited tote bag, this year's absolute hit🔥 style, brand new limited edition corduroy fabric, paired with premium leather texture, soft yet structured body, large size design, effortless and lazy chic, huge capacity, 100% head-turner on the street, hand-stitched leather logo, brand new cotton lining, two zip pockets, 38X 38 X18Cm, comes with original packaging
